Black Widow (2021)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $183,651,655Details
International Box Office $196,099,476
Worldwide Box Office $379,751,131
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $8,416,788
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $14,925,734
Total $23,342,522
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Natasha Romanoff aka Black Widow confronts the darker parts of her ledger when a dangerous conspiracy with ties to her past arises. Pursued by a force that will stop at nothing to bring her down, Natasha must deal with her history as a spy and the broken relationships left in her wake long before she became an Avenger.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$80,366,312 (43.8% of total gross)
Legs:2.29 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:48.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$200,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,160 opening theaters/4,275 max. theaters, 6.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $215,975,785

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: July 9th, 2021 (IMAX) by Walt Disney
July 9th, 2021 (Wide) by Walt Disney
International Releases: July 7th, 2021 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
July 7th, 2021 (Wide) (Finland)
July 7th, 2021 (Wide) (Hong Kong)
July 7th, 2021 (Wide) (France)
July 7th, 2021 (Wide) (South Korea)
Video Release: July 9th, 2021 by Disney+
MPA Rating: PG-13 for intense sequences of violence/action, some language and thematic material.
(Rating bulletin 2675 (cert #52793), 4/7/2021)

  • Summary
  • Box Office
  • Full Financials

Synopsis

Natasha Romanoff aka Black Widow confronts the darker parts of her ledger when a dangerous conspiracy with ties to her past arises. Pursued by a force that will stop at nothing to bring her down, Natasha must deal with her history as a spy and the broken relationships left in her wake long before she became an Avenger.
